summary: Comprehensive backend testing of ONYX PySide6 desktop AI chat assistant. All 51 pytest tests and 7/7 original tests pass. Verified all imports (PySide6, emergentintegrations, pyttsx3, whisper, torch, pyaudio, dotenv), StorageService CRUD operations, ChatService with Claude Opus 4.6, TTSService toggle and speak functionality, VoiceService Whisper initialization, setup.sh bash syntax and venv usage, directory structure, and code quality (no pvporcupine dead code, no hardcoded API keys).
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - no dead code (pvporcupine removed), proper error handling for missing API key
TTS integration properly implemented with enable/disable toggle and background thread for non-blocking speech
setup.sh correctly uses venv and installs emergentintegrations with --extra-index-url
All directory structure (Onyx/history, config, voice, logs) properly created
.env has CLAUDE_API_KEY= (blank) as expected - no hardcoded keys in code

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Desktop app, no web frontend

seed_data_creation: None - tests use temporary directories and clean up after themselves
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a PySide6 desktop application, NOT a web app. Testing is done via Python imports and script execution. The comprehensive test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_onyx_services.py covers all services. CLAUDE_API_KEY is intentionally blank - the app handles missing key gracefully by returning an error message. No pvporcupine references exist in the codebase.

features_verified.imports: All Python imports work cleanly (PySide6, emergentintegrations, pyttsx3, whisper, torch, pyaudio, dotenv)
features_verified.storage_service: init, create_chat, add_message, get_chat_messages, delete_chat, get_personality all working
features_verified.chat_service: Initializes with Claude Opus 4.6 model, warns when no API key set, returns error message when API key empty
features_verified.tts_service: available property is True, enabled toggles correctly, speak() runs without crash when enabled
features_verified.voice_service: Initializes Whisper model, no pvporcupine references exist
features_verified.chat_widget: Has TTS checkbox toggle (ttsToggle), sends speak=True on new AI responses, sends speak=False when loading history
features_verified.setup_sh: Uses python3 -m venv, installs emergentintegrations with --extra-index-url, installs requirements.txt, creates launcher with venv activation, bash syntax is valid
features_verified.directory_structure: Onyx/history, Onyx/config, Onyx/voice, Onyx/logs all exist, personality.txt exists
features_verified.env_file: .env has CLAUDE_API_KEY= (blank value) and no dummy/placeholder keys in code
